# Serial Air

> Wireless serial monitor for ESP8266, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi.
> Monitor serial output from your phone over WiFi — no PC needed.
> Free iOS & Android app with open-source Arduino library (MIT License).

## What is Serial Air?

Serial Air turns your smartphone into a wireless serial monitor. It connects to ESP8266, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, and any WiFi-capable microcontroller over TCP. The companion Arduino library (WirelessSerial) requires just 2 lines of code to add wireless serial output to any project.

## Key Features

- **Auto Discovery**: Devices found automatically via Bonjour/mDNS
- **Real-time Monitoring**: Live serial output with millisecond timestamps, under 50ms latency
- **Serial Plotter**: Visualize numeric data as real-time graphs
- **Bidirectional Communication**: Send commands to your device
- **Search & Filter**: Find specific log entries by keyword
- **Command Macros**: Save and send frequently used commands with one tap
- **Auto Reconnect**: Seamless recovery from network interruptions
- **Device Security**: Optional pairing codes, passwords, and device fingerprints
- **Log Export**: Save and share logs as text files
- **16 Languages**: English, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified/Traditional), Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Hindi, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, Russian, Arabic

## Supported Hardware

| Board | WiFi | BLE |
|-------|------|-----|
| ESP8266 (NodeMCU, Wemos D1 Mini) | Yes | — |
| ESP32 / C3 / S3 | Yes | Yes |
| Arduino Nano ESP32 | Yes | Yes |
| M5Stack / Seeed XIAO ESP32 | Yes | Yes |
| Arduino UNO R4 WiFi | Yes | — |
| Arduino + ESP-01 | Yes | — |
| Raspberry Pi Pico W | Yes | — |
| Raspberry Pi 3/4/5 | Yes | — |
| Orange Pi / Banana Pi | Yes | — |
| Any WiFi TCP device | Yes | — |

- [Landing Page](https://umemasait.com/serial-air/): Product overview, features, compatibility, FAQ
- [Landing Page (Dark variant)](https://umemasait.com/serial-air/lp.html): Alternative design

- [Code Generator (Dark variant)](https://umemasait.com/serial-air/lp-codegen.html): Alternative design

## Source Code

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/matdonaruno/serial-air): Full source code (MIT License)
- [Arduino Library (WirelessSerial)](https://github.com/matdonaruno/serial-air/tree/main/arduino/WirelessSerial): ESP8266/ESP32 library
